seo.metaTitle: VATGenius | Automated VAT solutions for refunds and national VAT compliance
seo.metaDescription: Enable businesses to automatically reclaim foreign input tax while seamlessly managing and fulfilling their national VAT obligations.

hero.title: Efficient VAT: Domestic compliance, foreign refunds.
hero.titleHighlight: Relief from compliance burden and additional revenue
hero.description: Enable businesses to manage their VAT automatically and digitally – from reclaiming foreign input VAT to fulfilling national VAT obligations. Our solution integrates seamlessly into existing platforms and delivers a consistent end-to-end VAT management experience.
hero.secondaryDescription: The integration with neobanks strengthens customer loyalty, increases transaction volume, and expands the offering with powerful solutions for foreign VAT refunds as well as the handling of national VAT obligations – all without additional administrative effort.
hero.ctaText: Request a Live Demo & Partnership Consultation

features.title: VATGenius API
features.description: Easy API integration enables automated data transfer from ERP and banking systems. Captures, organizes, processes, and validates invoice and receipt data to power foreign VAT recovery and domestic VAT compliance solutions for businesses and neobank platforms.

features.title: VATGenius Engine
features.description:
AI-powered invoice and VAT compliance assessment (domestic and cross-border)
Calculate potential foreign VAT refund amounts and identify reclaim opportunities
Support compliance with national VAT obligations (registrations, filings, and reporting)
Automated customer authorization and onboarding
Handle inquiries from domestic and foreign tax authorities
Real-time status tracking for refunds, filings, and compliance processes

features.title: VATGenius TAX API
features.description: Automates the submission of local and foreign VAT filings and refund applications, transmitting them digitally to the tax portals of the relevant countries.

benefits.title: Your Advantages & Benefits at a Glance

items.title: Revenue
items.description: New, passive revenue stream via profit-share.

items.title: Retention
items.description: Delivers tangible financial returns to your business customers, boosting loyalty.

items.title: Differentiation
items.description: Offer a unique, premium service that competitors lack.

security.title: Security and Compliance
security.description: At VATGenius, implementing effective cybersecurity measures is fundamental to ensuring the protection of sensitive data and thereby securing the trust of our customers.
features: Encryption protocols and multi-factor authentication for access controls
Careful review of every aspect of data processing
GDPR compliant data storage and handling

cta.title: Ready to Unlock New Revenue Streams?
cta.description: Join leading neobanks in offering automated VAT refund services to your business customers.
